title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Donate One (1) Unit of Grass Chopper to Samahan ng mga Magkakambing ng Los Baños with Office Address at Barangay Malinta, Los Baños, Laguna Represented by Its President Mr. Roman E. Salandanan. (AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 04/12/2021)
